summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reels feature. Backend API: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI: All core features working - Reels page loads, upload modal functional, like/comment/share buttons work, comments sheet opens correctly with input.

issues: Reels nav button (nav-reels) exists but is positioned off-screen to the right on mobile viewport due to FAB button in center taking space. Users must navigate directly to /reels URL or use a wider viewport.

passed_tests: UI: Reels page loads with header 'Reels'
UI: Upload Reel button (upload-reel-btn) visible and clickable
UI: Upload modal opens with video selection area and caption input (reel-caption)
UI: Upload Reel submit button (upload-reel-submit) present in modal
UI: Reel content displays with video player
UI: Like button (like-btn-{id}) visible and clickable
UI: Comment button (comment-btn-{id}) visible and clickable
UI: Share button (share-btn-{id}) visible and clickable
UI: Comments sheet opens showing existing comments
UI: Comment input (comment-input) visible and accepts text
UI: User avatar and username displayed on reels
UI: White text on dark background - good contrast ratio
critical_code_review_comments: Reels API implementation is complete and well-structured with proper authentication checks
Like/unlike toggle logic works correctly using $addToSet and $pull MongoDB operations
Comments count properly incremented/decremented when adding/deleting comments
Frontend ReelComments component correctly handles comment CRUD operations
UploadReel component has proper file validation (video type, 100MB max) and progress tracking
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed reels and comments for testing, with automatic cleanup fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reels feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints at /api/reels/* all working correctly (create, read, like, comment, share, delete). Frontend UI at /reels shows vertical scrolling reel player with interaction buttons. Upload modal allows video selection with caption. Comments sheet slides up from bottom with input field. Test reel exists in database with caption 'Test reel with like, comment, share features!' by testuser1916. Mobile viewport may hide the nav-reels button - navigate directly to /reels URL for testing.
